mapper.sql: id, model_id, version, version_name, version_tag, bpmn_xml, form_json, change_description, deployment_id, process_definition_id, publish_by, publish_time, tenant_id, create_time, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.model_id, v.version, v.version_name, v.version_tag, v.bpmn_xml, v.form_json, v.change_description, v.deployment_id, v.process_definition_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.real_name, ''), v.publish_by) AS publish_by, v.publish_time, v.tenant_id, v.create_time, v.del_flag FROM sys_flow_model_version v LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.username = v.publish_by AND u.tenant_id = v.tenant_id WHERE v.model_id = #{modelId} AND v.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY v.version DESC
SELECT MAX(version) FROM sys_flow_model_version WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND del_flag = 0

SELECT v.id, v.model_id, v.version, v.version_name, v.version_tag, v.bpmn_xml, v.form_json, v.change_description, v.deployment_id, v.process_definition_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.real_name, ''), v.publish_by) AS publish_by, v.publish_time, v.tenant_id, v.create_time, v.del_flag FROM sys_flow_model_version v LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.username = v.publish_by AND u.tenant_id = v.tenant_id WHERE v.id = #{versionId} AND v.del_flag = 0
